THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JIANG, XUE XIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COCHRANE, RICHARD DBA COCHRANE & CHOI'S COLL/BEUTY CHOI, HUY QUANG DBA COCHRANE & CHOI'S COLL/BEUTY $2,475.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,497.00, APPEAL DISMISSED, NO APPEARANCE BY APPELLANT/DEFT. IT IS FURTHER ORDER THAT ALL OF PLAINTIFF PERSONAL PROPERTY- INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO HER COSMETOLOGY & BEAUTICIANS LICENSES & CERTIFICATE BE RETURNED TO HER WITHIN 15 DAYS OF THE SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
